stocks.impact_theory: nCino reported strong Q4 FY2026 results exceeding expectations with robust revenue growth from banking software demand. Economic implications include accelerated SaaS adoption in fintech amid digital transformation. Market psychology: Relief rally post-earnings beat boosts confidence in growth stock. Historical parallels: Similar to SNOW's post-earnings surge in 2021. Analogies: Like a rocket igniting after fuel load (earnings beat), or a dam breaking releasing pent-up buying pressure.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Q4 beat drove +26% surge; X posts neutral but news positive (web:91-99); sentiment shift from hold to buy.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20% gains on continued fintech boom; target $46.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if guidance misses, potential 10% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Market rotation from growth stocks, competition in banking SaaS.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat with high volume confirms sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Eli Lilly's obesity pill received US approval, expanding GLP-1 market. Implications: Massive revenue potential from oral alternative to injections, reducing competition from NVO. Psychology: FOMO buying as obesity drug leader. Parallels: Mounjaro launch in 2022. Analogies: Like unlocking a new level in a game (convenience wins), or iPhone vs flip phones.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Approval news (web:100-106, initial SpaceX/LLY video); X mentions positive vs NVO (post:78); strong sentiment.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 10% upside on sales ramp; target $1000.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short on side effects or NVO dominance, 8% loss.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Regulatory hurdles, competition from Novo oral pill.

stocks.justification: Approval solid but pill competition emerging.

stocks.impact_theory: Nike cut Q4 sales outlook with 20% decline in China, citing weak demand. Implications: Consumer spending slowdown in key markets. Psychology: Panic selling on growth fears. Parallels: 2022 China COVID lockdowns. Analogies: Like a star athlete stumbling (China exposure), or leaking boat in a storm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat but weak guidance caused -12% drop (web:107-116); X negative (posts:79,83,86,87); high engagement bearish.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long dip buy if stabilizes, 15% rebound.

stocks.justification: Clear guidance miss with volume spike confirms bear shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Intel repurchased Ireland chip fab for $14.2B, signaling fab expansion and turnaround. Implications: Boosts manufacturing capacity amid AI/chip demand. Psychology: Vote of confidence lifts undervalued stock. Parallels: TSMC expansions. Analogies: Reclaiming home turf in a battle, or refueling a comeback fighter jet.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Fab buyback news drove +9% (web:127); X alerts positive (posts:81,85); chip sector rally.

stocks.justification: Positive move but broader chip volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Micron benefits from chip rally, HBM sold out for 2026 on AI demand. Implications: Memory shortage drives pricing power. Psychology: AI hype sustains momentum. Parallels: 2021 memory cycle. Analogies: Gold rush for AI memory, or oil boom in shortage.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Part of midday movers +2% (post:33); strong demand news (web:117-126); X positive (post:88).

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 20% on AI tailwinds; target $180.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Supply glut post-2026, China trade tensions.

stocks.justification: Sector tailwinds strong but cyclical risks.
